name: Pork Chops Ole
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, brown pork chops in oil; sprinkle with seasoned salt and pepper.
2. Meanwhile, in a greased 9 x 13 baking dish, combine rice, water, tomato sauce, and taco seasoning; mix well.
3. Arrange pork chops over the rice mixture; top with chopped green pepper.
4. Cover and bake at 350°F for 1 - 1/2 hours.
5. Uncover and sprinkle with shredded cheddar cheese; return to the oven until the cheese is melted.
